exercises.code:
import unicodedata
names = ['José', 'Jose\u0301', '']
for s in names:
    print(repr(s), '→', repr(unicodedata.normalize('NFC', s)))

a, b = 'MAÑANA', 'mañana'
match = a.casefold() == b.casefold()
print(match)

import unicodedata
a = 'José'
b = 'Jose\u0301'
print('raw ==', a == b)
print('nfc ==', unicodedata.normalize('NFC', a) == unicodedata.normalize('NFC', b))
print('causa: formas Unicode distintas NFC vs NFD residual')

raw = 'Ana María Quispe Huamán'
toks = raw.split()
ap1, ap2 = toks[-2:]
given = ' '.join(toks[:-2])
print(given)
print(ap1, ap2)

raw = 'María del Carmen Quispe Ríos'
toks = raw.split()
ap1, ap2 = toks[-2:]
given = ' '.join(toks[:-2])
print(given)
print(ap1, ap2)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Hints: keep del Carmen in given

fields = [f.strip() for f in line.split(',')]
print(fields)

toks = ['Jr.', 'Unión', '450']
print(' '.join(toks))
print('-'.join(toks))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Hints: join with space and hyphen

exercises.code:
raw = '999.000-111'
digits = ''.join(c for c in raw if c.isdigit())
print(digits)

raw = '(+51) 999-000-111'
digits = ''.join(c for c in raw if c.isdigit())
print(digits)

import re
email = 'user+tag@example.com'
pat = r'^[a-z]+@[a-z]+\.com$'
rejected = re.fullmatch(pat, email.lower()) is None
print('rejected=', rejected)
print('política: preferir check modesto de @ y dominio; no overvalidation con regex rígida')

import re
pat = r'^[A-Z]{3}$'
print(bool(re.fullmatch(pat, 'LIM')))
print(bool(re.fullmatch(pat, 'Lima')))

import re
pat = re.compile(r'^(?P<nom>\w+) (?P<ap>\w+)$')
m = pat.fullmatch('Ana Quispe')
print(m.groupdict())

import re
text = 'DNI 12345678'
print('search', bool(re.search(r'\d{8}', text)))
print('fullmatch', re.fullmatch(r'\d{8}', text) is not None)
print('nota: search encuentra substring; fullmatch exige todo el string')

import re
pat = re.compile(r'\b9\d{8}\b')
for s in ['llama al 999000111 ya', 'sin match aqui']:
    print(s, '→', pat.findall(s))

import re
log = 'ok LIM-01 y CUS-02 fin'
codes = re.findall(r'[A-Z]{3}-\d{2}', log)
print(codes)

print('patrón peligroso: (a+)+b sobre strings largos de a\'s')
print('riesgo: backtracking catastrófico / colgar proceso')
print('mitigación: preferir a+b o str methods; evitar cuantificadores anidados ambiguos')

evidence = {
    'raw_a': 'Juan Perez',
    'raw_b': 'Juan P Perez',
    'score': 0.67,
    'decision': 'review',
    'reason': 'score en banda de revisión; no fusionar automático',
}
print(evidence)

print('1) Jaccard mide similitud de tokens, no prueba legal de identidad')
print('2) Sin fuente autoritativa no se afirma parentesco ni fusión automática')
print('3) Política: review + evidencia (raw, score); no claims de parentesco')
exercises.justification_from_packet: You Do and demos: no parentesco claims
